creator: bofh@freebsd.org
text:
Unfortunately I cannot reproduce it on my builder. It must be due to some other packages in your system. For your references my latest build logs:
https://pkg.bofh.network/data/latest-per-pkg/py39-importlib-resources/6.0.0/

And it's always better to use pkg builder like poudriere for clean builds and use pkg instead of ports.
